_note: Curated source catalog for the move library. fetch_youtube.py reads this.
Each entry resolves to a YouTube clip either by an explicit `url` (+ optional
`section`: [start,end] seconds) or, when no url is given, by running a yt-dlp
search on `query` and auto-picking the best instructional candidate.
`covers` lists the move slugs a clip is expected to demonstrate (compilations
cover many; single moves cover one). `priority` 1 = main moves (round 1),
2 = long-tail (round 2). Slugs mirror the move names in index.html DATA.
Copyright: clips are fetched solely to run pose estimation (algorithmic
analysis); no footage is redistributed or used for training.
